title: eval_size_test uses three state booleans
description: eval_size_test uses three separate mutable variables (over: bool, under: bool, limit: Option<u64>) filled by a for loop, then combines them at the end. The over/under pair is a disguised enum. Suggested rewrite: enum SizeDir { Over, Under } and extract (dir, limit) in one pass, then: match (dir, limit) { (Some(Over), Some(l)) => size > l, (Some(Under), Some(l)) => size < l, _ => false }.
